title: GET /api/products/search returns 500 - Cannot find module 'fuse.js'
description: The product search endpoint was recently added to enable fuzzy search functionality. However, it crashes with a module not found error when called. Other product endpoints (list, get by ID, create) work fine. The developer who implemented the search feature may have forgotten to add a required package to the project dependencies.
steps_to_reproduce: Start the Node.js service with npm start
Receive 500 Internal Server Error with 'Search failed' message
Other product endpoints like GET /api/products work normally
error_log:
Error: Cannot find module 'fuse.js'
Require stack:
- /app/src/routes/products.js
expected_behavior: Returns 200 with array of products matching the search query
actual_behavior: Returns 500 Internal Server Error. Console shows 'Cannot find module fuse.js'
recent_changes: Added product search endpoint using fuse.js for fuzzy matching
